changes.before: Now the yard opened in front of her and dwarven hands were coming fast over the trampled snow.
changes.after: Now the yard opened in front of her and dwarves were coming fast over the trampled snow.

changes.before: What remained was the pair who had stood close enough to Frostmourne to carry one wrong thing out of that room alive.
changes.after: What remained was the pair who had heard the turn in the blade and lived.

changes.before: Then the wind got under her hood, and she remembered what waited farther south.
changes.after: Then the wind got under her hood, and the bay and the ship came back hard.

changes.before: They left without taking the offered bench. Six strides later the camp warmth fell away so completely it might have been imagined.
changes.after: They left without taking the offered bench. Six strides later the camp warmth was gone.

changes.before: Her fingers wrote it in the air.
changes.after: She wrote it in the air.

changes.before: Her mouth twitched.
changes.after: The corner of her mouth kicked once.

changes.before: "I can build it," Jaina said. "Doing it in a room with the blade in reach is a different question."
changes.after: "I can build it," Jaina said. "Doing it at sword range without dying is a different question."

changes.before: Antonidas answered on the third pulse with a silence so intent she knew he had been waiting on the chance of this call for days.
changes.after: Antonidas answered on the third pulse, too fast for a man caught unready.

changes.before: No title. No endearment. Only her name.
He understood enough not to waste her time on wonder.
The sea had a way of eating magic even when it was not trying.
changes.after: Out on open water, the amber light thinned faster.

changes.before: The sea had a way of eating magic even when it was not trying.
changes.after: Out on open water, the amber light thinned faster.

changes.before: Speed could be bought cleanly, and that made the price uglier.
changes.after: Nothing fought them on the way south but distance, so every extra knot came out of Jaina.

changes.before: By landfall she knew who had to buy the seconds.
No dramatic collapse. The moment she stopped feeding the sails, the spent strength hit all at once.
changes.after: The moment she stopped feeding the sails, the spent strength hit all at once.

changes.before: That settled it for Sylvanas.
The painted prince caught Jaina's eye.
Keeping silent sat badly in her mouth.
changes.after: Keeping silent left bitterness in her mouth.

changes.before: The same offense kept recurring in different dress.
I.
The little court went still.
changes.after: No one in the arch said anything.
